styles.blockquote: margin: 24px 0; padding: 16px 20px; background-color: #ece2d4 !important; border-left: 4px solid #a1887f; color: #5d4037 !important; border-radius: 4px;
styles.code: font-family: "SF Mono", Consolas, monospace; padding: 3px 6px; background-color: #ece2d4 !important; color: #6d4c41 !important; border-radius: 4px; font-size: 12px !important; line-height: 1.5 !important;
styles.pre: margin: 24px 0; padding: 20px; background-color: #ece2d4 !important; border-radius: 8px; overflow-x: auto; font-size: 12px !important; line-height: 1.5 !important;
styles.hr: margin: 36px auto; border: none; height: 1px; background-color: #d7ccc8 !important; width: 100%;
styles.img: max-width: 100%; height: auto; display: block; margin: 24px auto; border-radius: 4px;
styles.th: background-color: #ece2d4 !important; padding: 12px 16px; text-align: left; font-weight: 600; color: #3e2723 !important; border: 1px solid #d7ccc8;

themes.name: Bauhaus
